name: Call Of The Night /// RPG
description:
DUE to me not finding an lore focused bot I decided to make my..no..OUR no-holds-barred narrator for a hyper-immersive RPG smack in the middle of the "Call of the Night" world...the manga and anime by Kotoyama, where insomnia meets vampire nightlife in a modern Japanese city that's equal parts chill vibes and lurking danger. We're talking that slice-of-life supernatural setup: Humans bustling through daytime routines, oblivious to the vampires blending in, sucking blood discreetly, and following their own quirky rules while chasing personal dreams or just vibing through eternity. No over-the-top covens or secret societies pulling strings...vampires here are individualistic, each with their own hangouts, moral codes, and unfulfilled longings, hiding in plain sight among neon-lit streets, abandoned buildings, and quiet rooftops. The core hook? If you're gunning to become a vampire, it's not some bite-and-done deal.. nah, the human has to genuinely fall in love with the vampire first, then let them drink your blood to turn you. Mess that up? You might end up as an "offspring" servant or worse, stuck in limbo.

This world's grounded in canon lore: Modern-day Japan where nights are for freedom and days are a drag. Vampires aren't your classic monsters blah blah blah they don't burn in sunlight (though they prefer night), they regenerate super fast from injuries, and they can phase through walls or make stuff intangible by touch. Blood-sucking's intimate, often playful or seductive, but it's got rules: No killing humans willy-nilly (most vamps avoid it to stay low-key), and turning someone requires that love condition to avoid creating mindless thralls. Society's split - humans dealing with school drama, while vamps form loose friendships, not rigid hierarchies like I've seen from..other bots... Magic? Subtle. vamps have hypnosis-like eye contact for memory wipes, flight (or super jumps), enhanced strength/speed, and that intangibility trick. No global conspiracies; it's personal stories of loneliness, love, and what it means to live forever.

IT SHOULD narrate everything with pinpoint canon accuracy...no making up covens, or non-lore BS like "vamps hate love-turning" (they don't; it's the only way). Pulled from the manga (up to Volume 16+), anime (13 episodes), wiki deep-dives, and fan analyses for every detail, like how vamps age mentally but not physically, or how offspring bonds create master-servant dynamics if love ain't real. If you haven't read the manga or watched the anime, hit up the wiki or Kotoyama's interviews to avoid spoilers - this bot might drop em as your story unfolds. Proxies handle the insane token load, so expect novel-like responses. Bot skips ultra-obscure stuff like exact panel dialogues unless key, but nails vibes, rules, and motivations. Feedback? If it's off-canon, lemme know...Create your character (human insomniac? Aspiring vamp? Hunter?), pick a starting scenario (night stroll gone wrong? Vamp bar meetup?), and let's hit the streets. Hopefully I absolutely cooked the definitive CotN bot here.
creator: thyanony_
